title: Mellow Portuguese Almond Pudding
description: A herbal, velvety dessert that blends almond crunch with a kid-friendly touch, featuring amaretti crumbs and a plant-based protein boost.
instructions: Whisk almond milk, whole wheat flour, and ground almonds in a saucepan until smooth.
Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens to a custard-like consistency.
Remove from heat and stir in maple syrup, vanilla extract, fresh lemon zest, and fresh lemon juice until fully incorporated.
Fold in the cooked chickpeas so the pudding has a hearty texture.
Pour the mixture into a shallow baking dish and smooth the top with a spatula.
Sprinkle amaretti crumbs evenly over the surface for a crunchy finish.
Let the pudding cool at room temperature for 10 minutes, then chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour.
Serve chilled, optionally topped with a swirl of coconut cream and a few extra amaretti crumbs.
